title: Module 1
content:
Evolution of CAD/CAM and CIM, Industrial Look at CAD, Comparison of
CAD with traditional designing, Application of Computers in Design.
Topologies of CAD systems- Design database, graphic Standards, data
Exchange Formats, virtual Reality.
2D graphics: Line drawing algorithms, DDA line algorithm – Circle
drawing, Bressnham’s circle drawing algorithm- 2D transformation:
translation, rotation, scaling, reflection, clipping – 3D graphics basics
Shigley Modelling in CAD
Suggestion:-Task project- Students can choose their focus areas such as
Virtual Machine Simulation, Design and Development of a Virtual Reality
(VR) ,Simulation for Mechanical Assembly

title: Module 2
content:
NC part programming: part programming Fundamentals- manual
programming – NC Coordinate systems and axes– sequence number,
preparatory Functions
Computer aided part programming: Concept and need of CAP – CNC
languages – APT language structure: Geometry Commands, Motion
Commands, Post processor Commands, Compilation Control Commands-
Programming exercise
Suggestion: -Task project- Students can choose their focus areas such as –
NC Coordinate systems, C NC Coordinate systems

title: Module 3
content:
Introduction to part families- parts classification and coding – group
technology machine cells- benefits of group technology – Process Planning –
CAPP & types of CAPP- Automated process planning- AI in process
planning, Process planning software’s
Flexible Manufacturing systems: Introduction, Types, concepts, need and
advantages of FMS, Cellular and FMS- , applied to FMS
Suggestion:-Task project- Students can choose their focus areas such as –
Flexible Manufacturing systems,  AI in process planning

title: Module 4
content:
CIM wheel – CIM Database- CIM-OSI Model– Networking Standards in
CIM Environment –Network structure – Network architecture –TCP/IP,
MAP – Virtual Reality, Augmented Reality-Artificial Intelligence and Expert
system in CIM. Introduction to Rapid prototyping
Robot technology: Basic Components- Sensors and Actuators- Robot
application in Automotive Industry
Suggestion: -Task project- Students can choose their focus areas such as –
CIM, OSI, JIT and GT, Virtual Reality
